title: Two Pathways. One Map.
subtitle: "Choose one path, or bridge both for the ultimate health map."

pathwayA.title: The USA Protocol
pathwayA.description: Standardized, data-driven screenings aligned with modern Western preventive guidelines.

pathwayB.title: The Ancient Protocol
pathwayB.description: Traditional methods that identify imbalance before it manifests as physical symptoms.

quiz.title: Which Screening Circle Is Calling You?
quiz.incompleteText: Complete all 5 questions to reveal your health map pathway

defaultResult.title: Bridge Both (The Full Circle Map)
defaultResult.description: Your preferences show a balanced interest in both clinical rigor and ancient wisdom. We recommend our signature Bridge protocol.

usaResult.title: The USA Protocol
usaResult.description: You value data, evidence, and clinical metrics. We recommend starting with our high-standard Western diagnostic screening.

ancientResult.title: The Ancient Protocol
ancientResult.description: You are deeply aligned with energetic and holistic roots. We recommend starting with a Nadi Scan and Aura analysis.

questions.prompt: When you feel "off," what is the first thing you want to know?
questions.a: My specific numbers (blood pressure, glucose, or kidney function).
questions.b: The root energy or emotional state causing the imbalance.

questions.prompt: Which phrase resonates most with your health philosophy?
questions.a: "Show me the evidence and the data."
questions.b: "Listen to the wisdom of the body and the elements."

questions.prompt: What is your primary goal for this visit?
questions.a: To manage a clinical condition or get a medical clearance.
questions.b: To understand my constitution (Dosha) and optimize my lifestyle.

questions.a: Early detection through lab tests and physical exams.
questions.b: Maintaining harmony in my aura and energy flow to stay vital.

questions.prompt: What kind of plan helps you most?
questions.a: A structured roadmap with measurable checkpoints.
questions.b: A holistic map that connects mind, body, and spirit.
